  • July 2026

    • Sat 4
    4 July - 6 July

    Critérium de Paris 2026

    Halle Georges Carpentier 81, boulevard Masséna, Paris, France

    One of the largest veterans tournaments is back. Two genders, three weapons, four categories, packed in three days of fencing. Register on the site

    €60
